title: The White Hell of Pitz Palu
original_title: Die weiße Hölle vom Piz Palü
overview: Dr. Johannes Krafft climbs a 12,000-foot mountain over and over again to search for his wife, who was lost on their honeymoon. Another couple makes the dangerous climb with him.
